titleStmt.title: SII 34.116: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 116. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājarāja Rājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I), 7th year = A.D. 992.

This records a gift of money for feeding on the sacred hill 6 Brāhmaṇas versed in the Vēdas, by Ilāḍarāyar Pugaḻuyppavargaṇḍaṉ Vīrachōḻaṉ. The sabhā of Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam sold in lieu of the money the paddy dues collected from the tax mākkuṟuṇi on the uḻukuḍis of their northern hamlet Vīranārāyaṇa-nallūr. The portion of the tax that had been sold previously by the sabhā for a tank is said to be excluded from the present sale. (See No. 165 above for the previous sale).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOvirājairājakecari paṉmakku yāṇṭu Eḻā
vatu teṉkarai brahmatēyam śrīkaṇṭa caturvvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi ssabhaiyōm Ivvū
rttiruveṟumpūr malaimēl Uṭaiyār Ilāṭarāyar pukaḻuyppavar kaṇṭaṉ vīracōḻar Ittirumalaiyil
cantrātitaval vēdam vallār Aṟuvar brāhmaṇar niccatammum Uṇṇavaiytta
Uttamāgram kalam Oṉṟiṉukku Arici Irunāḻiyum ney Araippiṭiyum kummāyam Oṉṟiṉukkum kāykkaṟi O
ṉṟiṉukkum puḷikaṟi Oṉṟiṉukkum puḻukku kaṟi Oṉṟiṉukkum Aṭṭuvaṉa Urikkum Uppukkum kāyamitilai Ira
ṇṭukkum Aṭuvāṉukkum virakiṭuvāṉukkum kuṟuvāḷ kūlikkum Ākak kalam Onṟiṉukku nellu kuṟuṇi munnāḻi
Uḻakkēy mucceviṭṭākak kalamāṟukkumāka nicatam nellu Irutūṇi munnāḻi
muḻākkēy Āḻākkēy mucceviṭṭāka Ōrāṭṭai nāḷaikku vanta nellu Irunūṟṟu Aiympattu Aiṅka
lam Innellu Irunūṟṟu Aiympattu Aiyṅkalattukkumāka sabhaiyōm Ivvilāṭarājar pukaḻu
yppavar kaṇṭaṉ vīracōḻaniṭaik koṇṭa poṉ kaḻañciṟ pērttatu Uraiyun tuḷaiyum vaḻuvā
tatu kuṭiñaik kallāl koṇṭa Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉ kaḻañcu poṉṉukkumāka cantrātittaval Ā
ṇṭuvarai Aṭṭak(k)kaṭavōmāṉa nellu Irunūṟṟu Aiympattu Aiṅkalamum Āṇṭuvarai Aṭṭuvataṟkku vi
ṟṟukkuṭutta nellāvaṉa muṉpu nāṅkaḷ Ērikku viṟṟa mākkuṟuṇi nī
kki kiḷiyūr vāykkāllukku vaṭakku Eṅkaḷ vaṭapi
ṭākai vīranārāyaṇa nallūrāṉa karampaiyil mā
k kuṟuṇi nellu nūṟṟu Irupattu Oru kalanē Iru tūṇiyu
m Ittiruveṟumpūr malai Āḻvār tēvatāṉam karampai
yil mākkuṟuṇi nellu muppattu mukkalaṉēy tūṇiyum I
t tēvatāṉam karampaiyilēy nīr nellu Aṭṭakkaṭava nel
lu nūṟṟukkalamum Āka nellu Irunūṟṟu Aiypattu Aiykalamu
m kārpātiyum kaṭaiy pātiyumāka Ivvūr Uḻuta kuṭikaḷēy ko
ṭu ceṉṟu Ittirumalaiyiṟ cālaikkēy koṭu ceṉṟu tēvarkaṉmi
kaḷvacam Aḷantu taravu koḷḷak kaṭavārākavum Ivarkaḷ koṭu ce
ṉṟu Aṭṭāviṭil nāṅkaḷē koṭuceṉṟu nellaṭṭic cālai mu
ṭṭāmēy Ūṭṭuvikka kaṭavōmākavum cālaimuṭṭil paṉmā
heśvararey Iññellu Aṭṭakkaṭava kuṭikaḷaiyum Eṅka
ḷaiyum tāṅkaḷ vēṇṭum poṉ maṉṟap peṟuvārākavu
m Immaṉṟupāṭu Iṟuttum piṉṉaiyum Iññellu mu
Aṭṭa Ivvāṟu kalamum muṭṭāmēy
ṭṭakkaṭavōmākavum Ilakkaṇapaṭi Itti
rumalaiyil kōyililēy cilālēkai ceytu koḷḷa peṟuvārākavum candrā tittaval kalamāṟu muṭṭāmēy Ūṭṭak ka
ṭavōmāy Ipparicu I
n nellu viṟṟu kuṭuttō
m Ilāṭarāyar pukaḻuyppava
r kaṇṭaṉ vīracōḻakku śrī
kaṇṭhaccaturvetimaṅkalattu
peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyo
m taṇukkil cēnta canmaṉār kū
ṭṭattu karaipaṟittu paṭṭu nū
ṟ kūṭṭattu vātavūr tāmō
taraṉ Umāpati paṇiyāl
Ivvilaiyāvaṇa Ōlai E
ḻutiṉēṉ Ivvūr madhyasta
ṉ dhammappiriyaṉāṉa kalivi
caiyaṉ taruṇēntu cēkara
ṉēṉ Ivai Eṉ E
ḻuttu Itu panmāheśuvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
